findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "generate_signal" references sensitive artifacts (api_key, authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Generate an AI-powered crypto trading signal for a given pair and timeframe. Returns: action (OPEN_LONG | OPEN_SHORT | CLOSE), confidence (0.0–1.0), entry_price…
